top3.sql:
SELECT 
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_purchase_amount
FROM 
    catalog_sales
JOIN 
    customer ON cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_month_seq BETWEEN 1200 AND 1200
GROUP BY 
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name
ORDER BY 
    total_purchase_amount DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT c_customer_id, SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM catalog_sales
JOIN customer ON cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE d_month_seq BETWEEN 1200 AND 1200
  AND cs_call_center_sk IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c_customer_id
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_purchase_amount
FROM 
    catalog_sales
JOIN 
    customer ON cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_month_seq BETWEEN 1200 AND 1200
GROUP BY 
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name
ORDER BY 
    total_purchase_amount DESC
LIMIT 100;
